# loom

loom is a CLI for triaging and actioning GitHub PR comments.

## Docs

- README: ./README.md
- LLM Integration Guide: ./docs/LLM_GUIDE.md
- Skill: ./skills/loom/SKILL.md

## Key commands

- `loom list --pr <n> [--repo owner/repo] [--format auto|table|json|jsonl]`
- `loom find --pr <n> --query <text> [--repo owner/repo] [--format auto|table|json|jsonl]`
- `loom comment-top --pr <n> (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment-inline --pr <n> --path <file> --line <n> --side RIGHT (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment-inline --pr <n> --path <file> --start-line <n> --start-side RIGHT --line <n> --side RIGHT (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom comment-file --pr <n> --path <file> (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom edit --comment-id <id-or-url> (--body <text> | --body-file <path>) [--repo owner/repo] [--type auto|review|top-level] [--json]`
- `loom delete --comment-id <id-or-url> [--repo owner/repo] [--type auto|review|top-level] [--json]`
- `loom merge --pr <n> [--repo owner/repo] [--method merge|squash|rebase] [--json]`
- `loom reply --pr <n> --comment-id <id-or-url> --body <text> [--repo owner/repo] [--json]`
- `loom resolve --thread-id <PRRT_...> [--json]`
- `loom resolve --repo owner/repo --pr <n> --comment-id <id-or-url> [--json]`
- `loom unresolve --thread-id <PRRT_...> [--json]`
